message:
fix(tests): use K' not K for repair ESI cursor assertions

The repair_cursor_advances_across_calls test incorrectly used K (actual
source count) as the expected initial repair ESI. RFC 6330 defines repair
symbols as ESI >= K' (the padded source block size). For K=16, K'=18.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
